response.reasoning: Role requires 15 years experience, director-level IC, AI/cloud expertise, recognized AI products, and strategic leadership. Candidate has ~16-17 years total experience (freelancer since 2006, professional roles since 2009) which meets the year count. However, the seniority level is Senior/Staff, not Principal or Director-level IC. AI experience is minimal — only recent mention of MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq (since April 2025, ~1 year). No advanced degree, no recognized AI products/platforms, no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud product futures. Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz. Strengths in software craftsmanship, TDD, full-stack, and diverse tech stack, but lacks the strategic/principal-level scope and AI depth required.
strengths: ~15+ years of broad software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and backend
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, teaching, workshops)
concerns: No Principal/Director-level IC scope — career tops out at Senior/Staff
Minimal AI/ML depth; no recognized AI products or platforms built
Limited cloud strategy experience and no advanced degree in AI

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI expertise and recognized AI products

response.justification: The candidate meets the years-of-experience bar and shows strong engineering craftsmanship, but the role demands a director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, strategic cloud product vision, and demonstrated AI platforms — none of which are evident. AI exposure is recent and tactical (MCP tooling), not strategic. The seniority and AI-leadership gap is too large for a Principal AI Strategy role.
